title: calamagrostis breviligulata subsp. breviligulata
intro: Calamagrostis breviligulata subsp. breviligulata, also known as blue fescue, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis breviligulata subsp. breviligulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal problems and respiratory infections.
